summary: P0/P1/Enhancement security feature tests — all 33 tests pass. Covers CSP header, API key hashing, API key lookup, migration, export audit logs, startup validation, JWT rotation, regressions, and CVE package versions.

minor.issue: create_audit_log transforms action 'data_exported' into 'EXPORT_DATA_EXPORTED' in audit_trail. If frontend/consumers query with action='data_exported' (exact), it won't match. Use regex/partial match instead. Functionally correct — tests use substring match and pass.

critical_code_review_comments: create_audit_log() converts action='data_exported' to stored action='EXPORT_DATA_EXPORTED' (entity prefix prepended) in audit_trail. The legacy audit_logs collection retains the original 'data_exported'. This dual-storage inconsistency may confuse downstream consumers querying audit_trail with exact action matches.
ecdsa CVE-2024-23342 accepted risk is correctly documented — app uses HS256 exclusively, so EC key vulnerability is not applicable.

Startup validation (dev): server running with ENVIRONMENT=development + ChangeMe123! — PASS
Startup validation (dev): /docs accessible — server didn't crash — PASS
Startup validation (dev): backend logs show WARNING not FATAL — PASS
JWT rotation: token signed with old 'change_me_super_secret' → 401 on /api/admin/api-keys — PASS
JWT rotation: old token → 401 on /api/me — PASS
JWT rotation: fresh token (new secret) accepted — PASS

Regression admin login: wrong password → 401 — PASS
Regression list API keys: key_masked present, raw key absent — PASS
Regression list API keys: key_hash not exposed — PASS
Regression security headers: X-Frame-Options: DENY — PASS

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test API keys (TEST_hashing_test_key, TEST_lookup_test_key, TEST_list_regression_key) during test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P1/Enhancement security tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_iter68_p0_security.py (33 tests, all pass). Run with: pytest backend/tests/test_iter68_p0_security.py -v (10s). JWT secret is now 64-char hex in backend/.env. Old secret 'change_me_super_secret' correctly rejected. Audit log action for exports is stored as 'EXPORT_DATA_EXPORTED' in audit_trail (not 'data_exported'). Rate limit regression test fires 12 rapid requests — no need to sleep since it uses a non-existent email that will rate-limit quickly.
